tray.minimizedBody: OwO! Win Deployer has been minimized to the tray. Double-click the icon to reopen, or right-click to quickly manage terminals / services and exit.
tray.resident.title: Resident tray icon enabled
tray.resident.body: A resident icon is now in the notification area. Windows 11 may tuck it into the “^” overflow — expand it and drag the icon onto the taskbar. Double-click to open the app, right-click to manage and exit.
update.selfFoundBody:
A new version of {0} v{1} is available (current v{2}).

Go to the releases page to download the update?
